summary: Tested Print Queue Heartbeat mechanism for Multi-tenant POS system. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend login and printer settings page verified working. The agent-status endpoint correctly shows 'غير متصل' (offline) when no recent heartbeat, and 'متصل' (online) after polling with agent_version and device_id parameters.
critical_code_review_comments: print_queue.py lines 59-68: Heartbeat recording in get_pending_jobs correctly saves agent_version and device_id to agent_heartbeats collection - VERIFIED
print_queue.py lines 81-106: agent-status endpoint correctly checks if last heartbeat was within 30 seconds - VERIFIED
print_queue.py line 98: online = age < 30 - correctly determines online status based on 30-second threshold - VERIFIED
printService.js lines 33-43: checkAgentStatus function correctly calls /api/print-queue/agent-status and saves status to localStorage - VERIFIED
print_server.ps1 line 1891: Polling URL includes agent_version=6.0.0&device_id=default for heartbeat - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed print jobs for testing (automatically cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Print queue heartbeat mechanism fully tested and working. The PowerShell print agent (print_server.ps1) polls GET /api/print-queue/pending with agent_version=6.0.0&device_id=default parameters, which records heartbeat in MongoDB agent_heartbeats collection. Frontend calls GET /api/print-queue/agent-status to check if agent is online (last heartbeat < 30 seconds). Printer settings page shows 'وسيط الطباعة غير متصل' (offline) or 'متصل' (online) based on heartbeat status.
verified_features: GET /api/print-queue/agent-status returns online:false when no heartbeat exists
GET /api/print-queue/agent-status returns online:true after a recent heartbeat poll
POST /api/print-queue creates a print job successfully (requires auth)
POST /api/print-queue with order_data creates kitchen USB receipt job
Frontend checkAgentStatus in printService.js calls /api/print-queue/agent-status correctly
Printer settings page shows agent status indicator (red dot = offline)
Heartbeat timestamp is in valid ISO format

code_verification.heartbeat_recording: print_queue.py lines 59-68: if agent_version or device_id: await db.agent_heartbeats.update_one(...)

mocked_apis.Local Print Agent: PowerShell agent (print_server.ps1) - MOCKED (not running in test environment, but heartbeat mechanism verified via API)
